parents.subject: LU-13047 wbc: embeded MemFS for the basic MetaWBC framework

commit.subject: LU-13047 wbc: add tunables to enable/disable/config WBC
commit.message:
LU-13047 wbc: add tunables to enable/disable/config WBC

This patch adds tunables to enable/disable/config MetaWBC.

Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ibf3df46e429624df66b575ac81fa003cca9e8438
